name_en: 🆕 【Top Quality Replica】M81743 Zipper 👏👏 A retro aviation letter from AeroGram•Lezayi, exuding an exquisite atmosphere and Maison's unique understated personality. Made of soft and refined black calfskin reminiscent of velvet, accented with metallic first letters. Secure zipper, one-piece opening, with a rich array of slots and compartments inside. A large-capacity, versatile wallet perfect for modern men. Dimensions: 10x20x2.
